title: MWTools mod manifest (.mwmod)
description: Declarative, conflict-aware mod package (roadmap D1). A .mwmod is a zip with this manifest.json + an assets/ dir. Edits use stable LOCATORS (hashes/keys), never raw offsets where avoidable, so a mod survives minor file differences and can be applied/reverted safely via the backup layer. Packages carry the author's assets + the recipe ONLY — never copyrighted game data.

file.description: game-relative path of the target file

locator.description: how to find the edit point — prefer stable identifiers over offsets

expectOriginal.description: hex of the bytes that MUST currently be present (safety gate)

asset.description: path within the package assets/ dir

value.description: for set-vault-field: typed value to write

bytes.description: for raw-patch: hex replacement bytes (must equal expectOriginal length)
